content.raw:
Publications, interviews, citations, and source trail

The public record behind the rooms, photos, essays, interviews, and weird internet artifacts.

This page restores the useful part of the old Publications archive: the links, media appearances, and publication trail that show how the work has moved through journalism, technology, culture, activism, and photography over time.

It is not trying to be a perfect vanity bibliography. It is a proof map, a source trail, and a way to find the older interviews without burying them inside the About page.

Press trailBBC, CBC, Forbes, Reuters, WIRED, TED, and more.
Interview archiveVideo, audio, blogs, broadcasts, and early web history.
Creative commons impactPhotos cited, remixed, published, and used across the web.

Featured trail

A cleaned-up entry point to the publication and citation history that used to live as one giant undifferentiated list.

Science + crowds

Popular Science: NASA Needs to Harness the Genius of Crowds

A legacy Publications-page link that still explains a lot about the early open-web, crowd-intelligence thread in the work.

Creative Commons

PBS MediaShift: Creative Commons + Flickr

Part of the long public record around open photography, shareable media, and the social web before everyone called it content strategy.

TED

TED Blog: TEDxSummit photographer Kris Krug

A useful marker from the global conference, photography, and community-documentation era.

Legacy interview

The Next Web: Pro photographer Kris Krug talks iPhone photography

One of the restored older interviews from the mobile-photography and digital-media chapter.

Interviews and video archive

The old page had real interview proof hiding inside raw URLs. This keeps the source trail visible while admitting that some early-web destinations may have moved or disappeared.

  • Georgia Straight: Geek Speak
  • Kemp Edmonds: Digital Footprint interview
  • CBC BC: Kris Krug at TEDxOilSpill
  • TEDxOilSpill video archive
  • Bing video: documenting the Copenhagen protests
  • World Television Festival interview
  • Techvibes interview for W2 Media + Culture House
  • Lift Studios interview
  • YES! Magazine: Action is the antidote to despair
  • Kris Krug at the Multimedia Gallery
  • Drupal video: Bryght and Raincity Studios
  • TechCrunch: Geeks on a Plane Asia
  • Northern Voice photography session

Published, featured, or cited by

A representative slice from the larger About-page publication index. The full old list was enormous; this version keeps the signal without turning the page into a landfill of names.

News and culture

BBC News, CBC, Globe & Mail, The Guardian, The Atlantic, The Daily Beast, The Tyee, The Walrus, Toronto Star, USA Today, Time Magazine, Rolling Stone, Slate, Vice, The Verge, WIRED.

Technology and business

Ars Technica, Boing Boing, Business Insider, CNET, Fast Company, Forbes, Fortune, GeekWire, Mashable, Motherboard, Quartz, Reuters, TechCrunch, Techvibes, Wall Street Journal.

Environment, science, and public-interest media

CleanTechnica, Climate Central, DeSmog, Earth Island Journal, National Geographic, National Observer, New Scientist, NPR, PBS MediaShift, The Narwhal, Yale Environment 360.

Need the current media kit?

For current bookings, podcast guesting, bios, headshots, and producer-friendly context, use the Podcast Guesting / EPK page. For current projects and AI work, start with Work, Speaking, or Services.

meta.advanced_seo_description: A restored archive of Kris Krüg publications, interviews, press mentions, video appearances, citations, and legacy media links.
meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Publications, Interviews & Media Archive | Kris Krüg

jetpack-related-posts.title: Swahili Introduction – Kintu Krowfeather – Karibu kwenye Kabila la Kidijitali la Dunia la Kris Krüg: Kuunganisha Dunia Kupitia Lugha na Teknolojia
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Habari zenu, wenzangu, Mimi ni Kris Krug, mkazi wa EastVan, Vancouver, nchini Canada. Mimi ni mtaalamu wa kipekee na mwenye vipaji vingi, nikitumikia katika maeneo ya teknolojia, sanaa, na ujenzi wa jamii.

jetpack-related-posts.title: News
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Geek Speak: Kris Krug, co-author of Killer Photos With Your iPhone - The Georgia Straight Our picks for TEDxVancouver: Kris Krug, Photographer - Vancouver is Awesome Geek Speak: Kris Krug, technologist and photographer - The Georgia Straight

jetpack-related-posts.title: Urdu Language Introduction – Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: I'm super excited to share something groundbreaking with you all today. You're about to watch a formal introduction of me, but here's the catch—it's not just in English. I've used some cutting-edge AI technology to introduce myself in various languages.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Karibu kwenye Kabila la Kidijitali la Dunia la Kris Krüg: Kuunganisha Dunia Kupitia Lugha na Teknolojia – Swahili Welcome Page
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Habari zenu wote, mimi ni Kris Krüg! Karibuni kwenye ulimwengu wangu wa kidijitali. I've used some cutting-edge AI technology to introduce myself in various languages.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Japanese Introduction Page – KayKaySan
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Hey everyone, Kris Krüg here! Welcome to my digital universe. I'm super excited to share something groundbreaking with you all today. You're about to watch a formal introduction of me, but here's the catch—it's not just in English. I've used some cutting-edge AI technology to introduce myself in various languages.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Kris Krüg, Generative AI for…
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Kris Krüg, Generative AI for Creative Professionals Generative engines now spill out adequate everything. What the world needs, and will pay for, is authored judgment, taste that can be explained, defended, and taught. I'm Kris Krüg, Executive Director of BC + AI Ecosystem and founder of TheUpgrade.ai. I teach creative…
